positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a whimsical, glowing constellation map overlaying a pair of geometric mountain peaks. The style should be modern psychedelic-folk art, featuring clean, high-contrast linework and vibrant, celestial color gradients (deep indigo, sapphire blue, electric magenta, gold leaf accents). The composition must be centered, creating a perfect repeating pattern suitable for apparel. Include stylized, abstract representations of constellations (like Ursa Minor or Orion) using glowing dots and connecting lines, balanced by the sharp, symmetrical silhouette of the mountains. The background should have a subtle radial glow effect to emphasize the depth. Ideal for screen printing or embroidery.
